name: agent-audit
description: Read-only security audit for agent configuration, hooks, MCP endpoints, permissions, and inline credentials.

interface.shortDescription: Audit agent config for risky hooks and permissions.
interface.longDescription: Read-only security audit for agent setup. It flags hijacked-hook patterns, permission creep, plaintext MCP endpoints, inline credentials, and unpinned session-start packages.
defaultPrompt: Audit this agent config for risks.
